fields.name: House Of Bore
fields.description: Our flagship in-house atelier crafting architectural outerwear, tailored suiting, and vegetable-tanned leather goods.

fields.name: Urban Edge
fields.description: Technical city wear and weatherproof gabardine trench coats engineered for metropolitan resilience.

fields.name: North Trail
fields.description: Scottish Highland mills specializing in heavyweight merino knitwear, cashmere beanies, and tactile wool throws.

fields.name: Apex Wear
fields.description: Japanese selvedge denim looms and minimalist organic cotton shirting crafted in Okayama.

fields.name: Modern Essentials
fields.description: Florentine leather craftsmen producing bench-made Chelsea boots, suede loafers, and minimalist horology.
